Banyan Ledger Services Private Limited (controller) and Hibiscus Cloud Solutions LLP (processor) issue this India Privacy Notice & Data Processing Addendum for enterprise clients.
Purpose: onboarding, KYC support, broker back-office integration, and listed-company compliance; lawful basis includes consent and legitimate uses under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (India).
Product names mentioned herein (LotusPay KYC Suite, Banyan Vault, MangoDesk) are internal modules and do not imply collection of every field shown in demo screens.
Identifiers on forms are minimised; we do not require Aadhaar for account creation; placeholder entries such as PAN: ZZZZZ9999Z, GSTIN: 00AAAAA0000A0Z0, Aadhaar: 0000-0000-0000 are invalid examples only.
Data Subject Access Requests may be submitted via dsar@banyanledger.example; we authenticate using ticket IDs and will not ask for OTPs by telephone.
For listed-client workflows, Banyan Ledger operates under the Insider Trading Policy of Marigold Renewables Limited (Indica Stock Exchange) and the national securities regulator’s PIT framework.
Unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) includes draft financials and board-approved but unannounced actions; trading windows are closed accordingly, and already-announced results are out of scope.
Positive special-category data (biometric): Data Subject Employee-17 at Marigold Renewables Limited provided a fingerprint template for time attendance solely with explicit, revocable consent.
The biometric template is stored encrypted, used for attendance matching only, not shared with affiliates, and is deleted within 30 days of deactivation; audit logs are retained for 180 days.
Our Rainbow Workforce Charter promotes inclusion and equal opportunity; this abstract DEI commitment does not process religion, caste, or political-opinion data about any individual.
Sports and place metaphors in training (Crimson Kites XI, the Navapura sprint) are illustrative and do not relate to customer records or market conduct determinations.
Child data: services are not directed to persons under 18 years; if we learn a minor has submitted information, we erase such records and notify the guardian contact where feasible.
Cross-border transfers: limited support logs may be processed by Hibiscus Cloud Solutions LLP in the Sarovar Island Region under an inter-affiliate data transfer agreement with encryption-in-transit.
Retention: PAN references in invoices (if provided by a corporate contact) are retained for seven financial years under the Bharat Revenue Code; Aadhaar numbers are never stored by us.
Incident response and whistleblower channels: sectrisk@banyanledger.example; do not submit UPSI through unencrypted email, and use the compliance portal for blackout-window declarations.
Wellness and culture notes in MangoDesk (e.g., “take a deep breath before the monsoon marathon”) are generic content and not medical advice or employee health profiling.
